title: First screen, Continue button
scenario: Verify the Continue button is present on the first onboarding screen and clicking it opens the second screen.
steps: Open the app and navigate to the first onboarding screen.
Locate the Continue button at the bottom of the screen.
Verify that the Continue button is present.
Observe the screen that appears after clicking.
expected: The Continue button is present on the first onboarding screen. After clicking it, the second onboarding screen opens.
